title: XR-L32BK 32cm Cast Aluminium Shallow Casserole Dish, Suitable for Oven and All Types of Hob, Perfect for Stews and Casseroles, Black
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: CAST ALUMINIUM CASSEROLE DISH – Makes this dish 75% lighter than cast iron alternatives
COMPATIBLE WITH ALL HOBS – Including gas, electric, induction and ceramic
NON-STICK COATING – Easy cooking with no risk of sticking on the Dual-Layer Pfluon coating
2 COLOURS, 2 SIZES – Choose from Cream or Black in 28 and 32cm sizes
GRUNWERG: Designed and imported by a Sheffield family company with 75 years' experience of producing high quality tableware
description: From the manufacturer Introducing a new range of cast aluminium cookware Featuring casserole dishes, all in one pans and a dual purpose roasting dish NON-STICK The entire cast aluminium range by Commichef features a non-stick coating. Not only does this mean less oil whilst cooking, but this also makes the dish super easy to clean. SUITABLE FOR ALL HOBS AND OVENS Our casserole dishes are compatible with all types of hobs, including induction hobs. Also oven safe up to 240 degrees, these pots accommodate all kinds of dishes from simply frying veg to cooking hearty stews. FROM THE HOB, TO THE OVEN, TO THE TABLE One pot suitable for cooking as well as serving. Safely transport your dish from the kitchen to your table thanks to its sturdy handles and secure lid. LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE Our casserole dishes are extremely tough and will stand the test of time, yet also 75% lighter than cast iron alternatives making them easy to handle and perfect for everyday use. SUPERIOR HEAT CONDUCTIVITY Thanks to the cast aluminium construction, Commichef’s casserole dishes boast excellent heat conduction and retention ensuring heat spreads quickly and evenly WHY CHOOSE COMMICHEF? With quality and ease at the forefront of every design, Commichef’s cast aluminium range should be your first choice for cookware. With a choice of 2 colours and a range of shapes and sizes, we offer something to suit every kitchen.
